title: Sanji and Zeff’s Starvation Flashback
description: On pages 17–18, Sanji’s past with Zeff is revealed through their starvation on a rock, explaining the debt that binds him to the Baratie.
scene: The flashback strips away the noise of battle and focuses on hunger, sacrifice, and the dream of creating a restaurant where no one is denied food.

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: The only one who can run a restaurant like that in this age of pirates is me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A-Alright! Then I'll help out too! So please don't die yet!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: Ha... it's impossible for a weak little eggplant like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's 2 people who've passed out on this rock!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I must've heard their voices during that one storm around here 3 months ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...you ate your own leg and gave me all the food...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm not handing over this restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And I won't let you kill the damn geezer either...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He's a geezer who gave up everything for the sake of one little brat.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If I can't even put my life at risk to save him,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then I can never repay my debt to him!

summary: This part gives emotional meaning to Sanji’s choices: Zeff’s sacrifice explains why feeding the hungry is sacred to him.
